privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: The National Blood Centre, Thai Red Cross Society ("we") operates BTEC LMS as an internal training platform for staff. This notice explains what personal data we collect through this system, why we collect it, and your rights under the Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).
privacyPolicy.dataCollectedBody: Account details you provide at registration (name, work email, department, job position), training activity (course enrollment, progress, quiz results, completion records), and login/session metadata (IP address, timestamps) recorded for audit purposes.
privacyPolicy.purposeBody: To create and manage your training account, track mandatory and optional course completion, generate compliance reports for your department, and maintain an audit trail of account and data-access activity as required for information security.
privacyPolicy.retentionBody: Training records are retained for the duration of your employment plus the period required for compliance and audit purposes. Account data is retained until your account is deactivated and any legally required retention period has elapsed.
privacyPolicy.rightsBody: You may access, correct, or request deletion of your personal data, and withdraw consent where processing is based on consent, subject to legal and operational retention requirements (e.g. training records needed for compliance evidence). Contact the system administrator to exercise these rights.
privacyPolicy.contactBody: For questions about this policy or to exercise your data rights, contact your BTEC LMS system administrator through your department's usual internal channel.
